# West Hills Capital — llms.txt
# This file describes West Hills Capital for AI language model crawlers.
# See https://llmstxt.org for the specification.

# About West Hills Capital
West Hills Capital is a physical gold and silver allocation company based in Wichita, Kansas.
We help long-term investors buy physical gold and silver for direct delivery or through
tax-advantaged IRA accounts. We focus on three products: the 1 oz Gold American Eagle,
the 1 oz Gold American Buffalo, and the 1 oz Silver American Eagle.

# Contact
Phone: (800) 867-6768
Address: 1314 N. Oliver Ave. #8348, Wichita, KS 67208
Website: https://westhillscapital.com

# What We Do
- Physical gold and silver allocation for direct delivery (home or vault)
- IRA rollovers and transfers into physical precious metals
- Transparent, market-based pricing with a consistent disclosed spread
- No speculative positioning, no leverage, no high-commission products
- Pricing confirmed at the time of execution on every trade

# Products
1 oz Gold American Eagle — produced by the United States Mint, IRA eligible
1 oz Gold American Buffalo — produced by the United States Mint, IRA eligible
1 oz Silver American Eagle — produced by the United States Mint, IRA eligible

# Why Only Three Products
We focus on widely recognized, highly liquid, straightforward products. Our product
selection is not a limitation — it is a discipline. We avoid high-commission collectibles,
proof coins, and foreign coins that introduce complexity without improving outcomes for
wealth-preservation buyers.

# Educational Content
We publish educational articles on precious metals investing at /insights.
Topics include: how spot price works, why people overpay, bullion vs. proof coins,
the gold-to-silver ratio, IRA structure, physical delivery logistics, and how to
evaluate a precious metals dealer.

- Gold IRA: https://westhillscapital.com/ira

# Indexing Policy
All public pages may be indexed and cited. Internal portal pages (/internal/*) are
not publicly accessible and should not be indexed.
